title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Oberoi Realty Global Group are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Oberoi Realty Global Group:
Oberoi Realty Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
